## Type of change

<!-- Put an x inside [ ] to tick -->

- [ ] `feat`     — new script or feature
- [ ] `fix`      — bug fix
- [ ] `data`     — data pipeline change
- [ ] `model`    — notebook or ML change
- [ ] `ci`       — GitHub Actions workflow
- [ ] `docker`   — Dockerfile change
- [ ] `docs`     — README, CONTRIBUTING, report
- [ ] `chore`    — deps, config, tooling

## Checklist

<!-- All boxes must be ticked before requesting a review -->

- [ ] I branched off `develop` (not `main`)
- [ ] My branch name follows the convention: `feature/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, `chore/`
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] `flake8 src/ --max-line-length=120` passes locally with zero errors
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, tokens, API keys, or `.env` files
- [ ] I have not committed any data files (`*.csv`, `*.parquet`, model weights)
- [ ] `data/id2label.json` is the only file in `data/` that I am committing (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested my script / notebook locally and it runs without errors
- [ ] I have assigned **@s-fk** as reviewer
